A.name: Candidate A
A.persona: Charismatic, well-spoken, and widely trusted by older constituents
notes: Known for being accessible and frequently seen in community events
Can appear complacent about newer city issues
policy_focus: Expanding public healthcare access in low-income districts

B.name: Candidate B
B.persona: Idealistic, energetic, and popular with younger voters
notes: Compensates with detailed research and transparency
Seen as a threat by Candidate A's camp
policy_focus: Free public transit for students and seniors
Stricter environmental regulations for large businesses

C.name: Candidate C
notes: Known for bold and often unverifiable claims
policy_focus: Cutting 'wasteful' government programs without specific targets
